description: N2 Browser — AI-powered Electron browser with 67+ plugin tools

tools.name: capture_screenshot
tools.description: Capture viewport or full page as base64 PNG/JPEG

tools.name: capture_element
tools.description: Capture specific element by ATree ref number

tools.name: ext_screenshot
tools.description: Capture entire desktop/monitor screen

tools.name: start_recording
tools.description: Start recording browser actions (clicks, typing, navigation)

tools.name: stop_recording
tools.description: Stop recording and save session

tools.name: ai_read
tools.description: Read page as clean markdown, stripping ads/nav/noise

tools.name: ai_scroll
tools.description: Scroll to position, element, or by pages

tools.name: ai_surf
tools.description: Navigate to a URL in the current tab

tools.name: human_click
tools.description: Click on element by SOM ref number or coordinates

tools.name: human_type
tools.description: Type text into focused element or by ref

tools.name: open_tab
tools.description: Open a URL in new tab, returns target ID

tools.name: list_tabs
tools.description: List all open tabs with URLs and status

tools.name: switch_tab
tools.description: Switch to a different tab by ID

tools.name: close_tab
tools.description: Close a tab by ID

tools.name: scroll_and_read
tools.description: Scroll entire page (infinite/lazy) and extract all text

tools.name: browser_web_search
tools.description: Search the web across 70+ sources via SearXNG

tools.name: browser_news_search
tools.description: Search recent news by topic and freshness

tools.name: smart_read
tools.description: All-in-one page intelligence (content + iframes + shadow DOM)

tools.name: extract_links
tools.description: Extract all page links categorized by type

tools.name: parse_tables
tools.description: Parse HTML tables to structured JSON with headers

tools.name: scrape_data
tools.description: Extract structured data using CSS selectors

tools.name: html_to_markdown
tools.description: Convert page HTML to clean Markdown

tools.name: copy_to_clipboard
tools.description: Copy text to system clipboard

tools.name: find_element
tools.description: Find elements by visible text, get selectors and positions

tools.name: fill_form
tools.description: Auto-fill form fields with semantic field matching

tools.name: press_key
tools.description: Press key or combo (Ctrl+C, Enter, Alt+F4)

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Download file from URL or page resource

tools.name: resize_viewport
tools.description: Resize viewport to device preset (iPhone, iPad, desktop, 4K)

tools.name: toggle_dark_mode
tools.description: Toggle dark/light mode on any page

tools.name: translate_text
tools.description: Translate text or entire page to target language
